    "Oxygen level is 19.0%, which is below the OSHA minimum safe entry level of 19.5%",
    "Attempting entry or continuing work under these atmospheric conditions constitutes an immediate hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Prohibit entry and immediately evacuate any personnel from the space",
    "Initiate continuous forced-air ventilation to raise oxygen levels",
    "Re-test the atmosphere throughout the space before permitting entry"

  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.146, an atmosphere with an oxygen concentration below 19.5% is considered oxygen-deficient and permit-required confined space entry is strictly prohibited. Work cannot proceed until ventilation is established and re-testing confirms oxygen levels are within the safe range of 19.5% to 23.5%.",

    "OSHA 1910.146(b)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(c)(5)(ii)(C)"
  ]
